name: study_naming_pairs
description: Named constant pairs (timestamp, normalized_name) used to verify the timestamp__symphony study name format. Provenance: schema-derived constants; values are chosen to be unambiguous and cover separator edge cases (underscores in normalized_name, ISO timestamp format). No bare literals in assertions — tests import this file and assert format properties against these constants.

pairs.description: Basic case: ISO-style timestamp + snake_case normalized name
Multi-word symphony name already normalized to snake_case
Normalized name contains underscores; double-underscore separator must still be unique and parseable
